---
applyTo: "fennec-modbus/**/*"
---

This is a pet project, but the crate is published on <https://crates.io/crates/fennec-modbus>; hence, the standards are stricter than those of a pet project, but lower than those of a widely used public crate.

Additionally, proofread the comments and doc comments, and suggest edits and wording targeted at an external audience.

# Modbus specifications

- [Protocol](https://www.modbus.org/file/secure/modbusprotocolspecification.pdf)
- [TCP/IP implementation guide](https://www.modbus.org/file/secure/messagingimplementationguide.pdf)
